raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Offshore Wind & Jobs Act aims to promote clean energy and reduce dependence on fossil fuels.",
    "The legislation seeks to create new job opportunities while protecting California's cultural and natural resources.",
    "The California Offshore Wind & Jobs Act will help transition California towards a cleaner and more sustainable future.",
    "The Act aims to develop offshore wind projects along California's coastline.",
    "Building the infrastructure for offshore wind requires billions of dollars in investment.",
    "The Act is designed to stimulate the growth of a robust offshore wind industry and create thousands of jobs.",
    "The legislation aims to unlock potential for generating large amounts of clean electricity.",
    "The California Offshore Wind & Jobs Act is expected to significantly reduce greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "The development of offshore wind projects will require a skilled workforce.",
    "The offshore wind projects will offer high-quality jobs with competitive wages and benefits.",
    "The legislation is crucial in helping California achieve its renewable energy goals of 90% by 2035 and 100% by 2045."
  ]
}
```
